checks.title: Canonical memory store exists under runtime_state/memory
Workspace progress projection contains durable objective or milestone data
Workspace progress projection exposes a durable updatedAt timestamp
At least one bounded memory pack is compiled
Latest bounded memory pack reuses previously persisted canonical memory
Latest bounded memory pack excludes task-family mismatched governed memory types
Public lane projections expose canonical memory-derived lesson or improvement state
Promotion and revocation health entries expose non-empty memoryType values
Canonical observation projection is generated from runtime outcomes
Continuity projection and public summary are generated
AGI readiness live surface is generated from canonical evaluation evidence
Readiness headline breadth semantics are explicit and consistent with repo-wide coverage
Readiness promotion surface does not present self-comparison as a distinct incumbent comparison
Repo-wide coverage failures are reflected in readiness bottlenecks and blocked reasons
Learning lane projections reflect canonical runtime observations
